proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months is lower in patients with ecog_ps=2 than in patients with ecog_ps=0.
Higher ecog_ps (treated as linear 0/1/2) is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS by ECOG: 0=5.27, 1=4.05, 2=2.91. OLS coef(ECOG=2 vs 0) = -2.363 months, p=0.00e+00; ECOG=1 vs 0 coef = -1.218, p=0.00e+00.
Treating ECOG as linear: each +1 point in ECOG associates with -1.190 months change in PFS, p=0.00e+00.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months is lower in patients with stage_iv=1 than in stage_iv=0.
Older age_years is associated with shorter pfs_months.
pfs_months differs between sex_female=1 and sex_female=0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS: stage_iv=1 -> 3.70, stage_iv=0 -> 5.05, difference=-1.352, t-test p=0.00e+00.
Per +1 year of age, PFS changes by 0.1765 months (p=0.00e+00).
Mean PFS: female -> 4.31, male -> 4.31, difference=-0.006, p=7.70e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher cea_ng_ml is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Per 1-unit increase in albumin_g_dl: coef=0.46536 months, p=3.25e-115.
Per 1-unit increase in ldh_u_l: coef=-0.00032 months, p=1.26e-02.
Per 1-unit increase in cea_ng_ml: coef=-0.00535 months, p=3.13e-17.
Per 1-unit increase in crp_mg_l: coef=-0.00202 months, p=6.50e-02.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher nlr (neutrophil-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Per 1-unit increase in nlr: coef=0.00522 months, p=2.90e-01.
Per 1-unit increase in weight_loss_pct_6mo: coef=-0.07302 months, p=2.21e-167.
Per 1-unit increase in hemoglobin_g_dl: coef=-0.01009 months, p=7.77e-02.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_cetuximab=1 have different mean pfs_months than those with treatment_cetuximab=0 (unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_bevacizumab=1 have different mean pfs_months than those with treatment_bevacizumab=0 (unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab=1 have different mean pfs_months than those with treatment_pembrolizumab=0 (unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_encorafenib=1 have different mean pfs_months than those with treatment_encorafenib=0 (unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=1 have different mean pfs_months than those with treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=0 (unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_regorafenib=1 have different mean pfs_months than those with treatment_regorafenib=0 (unadjusted).

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted PFS on treatment_cetuximab=1 vs 0: 4.29 vs 4.32, difference=-0.038, p=8.80e-02.
Unadjusted PFS on treatment_bevacizumab=1 vs 0: 4.30 vs 4.32, difference=-0.019, p=3.54e-01.
Unadjusted PFS on treatment_pembrolizumab=1 vs 0: 4.32 vs 4.31, difference=0.005, p=8.56e-01.
Unadjusted PFS on treatment_encorafenib=1 vs 0: 4.32 vs 4.31, difference=0.005, p=8.73e-01.
Unadjusted PFS on treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=1 vs 0: 4.27 vs 4.32, difference=-0.044, p=2.44e-01.
Unadjusted PFS on treatment_regorafenib=1 vs 0: 5.09 vs 4.12, difference=0.972, p=1.71e-216.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with kras_mutation=1 have different mean pfs_months than those with kras_mutation=0 (unadjusted).
Patients with nras_mutation=1 have different mean pfs_months than those with nras_mutation=0 (unadjusted).
Patients with braf_v600e=1 have different mean pfs_months than those with braf_v600e=0 (unadjusted).
Patients with msi_high=1 have different mean pfs_months than those with msi_high=0 (unadjusted).
Patients with her2_amplified=1 have different mean pfs_months than those with her2_amplified=0 (unadjusted).
Patients with ntrk_fusion=1 have different mean pfs_months than those with ntrk_fusion=0 (unadjusted).

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted PFS by kras_mutation=1 vs 0: 4.12 vs 4.45 (n+=20898, n-=29102), difference=-0.327, p=1.86e-58.
Unadjusted PFS by nras_mutation=1 vs 0: 4.53 vs 4.30 (n+=1506, n-=48494), difference=0.221, p=7.31e-04.
Unadjusted PFS by braf_v600e=1 vs 0: 4.09 vs 4.32 (n+=2272, n-=47728), difference=-0.228, p=3.47e-07.
Unadjusted PFS by msi_high=1 vs 0: 4.29 vs 4.31 (n+=2513, n-=47487), difference=-0.019, p=6.80e-01.
Unadjusted PFS by her2_amplified=1 vs 0: 4.26 vs 4.31 (n+=1504, n-=48496), difference=-0.056, p=3.60e-01.
Unadjusted PFS by ntrk_fusion=1 vs 0: 4.35 vs 4.31 (n+=251, n-=49749), difference=0.040, p=7.86e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is an interaction between treatment_cetuximab and kras_mutation on pfs_months: cetuximab benefit is larger (more positive) in kras_mutation=0 (wild-type) than in kras_mutation=1.
Within the kras_mutation=0 subgroup, treatment_cetuximab=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than treatment_cetuximab=0.

analyses.result_summary:
Subgroup means (rows=kras_mutation, cols=treatment_cetuximab):
treatment_cetuximab         0         1
kras_mutation                          
0                    4.462598  4.415092
1                    4.129785  4.101866
Interaction coef = 0.020, p=6.65e-01. Cetuximab main effect = -0.048.

analyses.code: ttest cetuximab effect within kras=0 and kras=1 subgroups
analyses.result_summary: In KRAS-wt: cetuximab vs no = 4.42 vs 4.46, diff=-0.048, p=1.22e-01. In KRAS-mut: cetuximab vs no = 4.10 vs 4.13, diff=-0.028, p=3.76e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cetuximab benefit (treatment_cetuximab=1 vs 0) on pfs_months is attenuated or absent in nras_mutation=1 vs nras_mutation=0 (negative interaction).

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_cetuximab * nras_mutation', df).fit() and stratified t-tests
analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = -0.007, p=9.60e-01. In NRAS-wt: cetux vs no diff=-0.037, p=9.76e-02. In NRAS-mut (n=1506): diff=-0.044, p=7.57e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cetuximab benefit on pfs_months is reduced in braf_v600e=1 patients vs braf_v600e=0 patients (negative interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef=-0.026, p=8.05e-01. In BRAF-wt: cetux diff=-0.036, p=1.11e-01. In BRAF-V600E: cetux diff=-0.063, p=5.07e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and msi_high on pfs_months: pembrolizumab benefit is larger in msi_high=1 than in msi_high=0.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef=0.002, p=9.88e-01. In MSS: pembro vs no diff=0.005, p=8.61e-01. In MSI-H (n=2513): pembro vs no diff=0.007, p=9.57e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Encorafenib benefit on pfs_months is larger in braf_v600e=1 patients than in braf_v600e=0 patients (positive interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef=-0.141, p=3.76e-01. In BRAF-wt: encorafenib vs no diff=0.013, p=7.18e-01. In BRAF-V600E: encorafenib vs no diff=-0.129, p=3.29e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Trastuzumab/tucatinib benefit on pfs_months is larger in her2_amplified=1 than her2_amplified=0 (positive interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef=0.063, p=7.78e-01. In HER2-: trast/tuca vs no diff=-0.046, p=2.32e-01. In HER2-amp: trast/tuca vs no diff=0.017, p=9.34e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_bevacizumab=1 is associated with longer pfs_months overall, and there is no strong interaction with right_sided_primary.

analyses.result_summary: Bevacizumab main coef=-0.012, p=6.32e-01. Right-sided main coef=-0.295, p=1.10e-24. Interaction coef=-0.022, p=6.08e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cetuximab benefit on pfs_months is larger in left-sided (right_sided_primary=0) than right-sided primaries (negative interaction term).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef=0.026, p=5.83e-01. In left-sided: cetux diff=-0.049, p=8.59e-02. In right-sided: cetux diff=-0.024, p=4.90e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months is shorter in patients with liver_mets=1 than liver_mets=0.
Mean pfs_months is shorter in patients with bone_mets=1 than bone_mets=0.
Mean pfs_months is shorter in patients with adrenal_mets=1 than adrenal_mets=0.
Mean pfs_months is shorter in patients with pleural_effusion=1 than pleural_effusion=0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS by liver_mets=1 vs 0: 4.30 vs 4.31, diff=-0.019, p=5.19e-01.
Mean PFS by bone_mets=1 vs 0: 4.34 vs 4.31, diff=0.031, p=2.25e-01.
Mean PFS by adrenal_mets=1 vs 0: 4.36 vs 4.31, diff=0.058, p=8.88e-02.
Mean PFS by pleural_effusion=1 vs 0: 4.27 vs 4.32, diff=-0.052, p=6.88e-02.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Greater number of metastatic sites (sum of liver/bone/adrenal/pleural/pericardial/contralateral_lung) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher fatigue_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months (adjusted for other symptoms).
Higher pain_nrs is associated with shorter pfs_months (adjusted for other symptoms).
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months (adjusted for other symptoms).
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months (adjusted for other symptoms).

analyses.result_summary: Per +1 metastatic site: coef=-0.0103 months, p=4.19e-01.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ fatigue_grade + pain_nrs + dyspnea_grade + appetite_loss_grade', df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Symptom fatigue_grade coef=-0.0018, p=8.48e-01 (mutually adjusted).

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ fatigue_grade + pain_nrs + dyspnea_grade + appetite_loss_grade', df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Symptom pain_nrs coef=-0.0023, p=5.46e-01 (mutually adjusted).

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ fatigue_grade + pain_nrs + dyspnea_grade + appetite_loss_grade', df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Symptom dyspnea_grade coef=-0.0093, p=3.11e-01 (mutually adjusted).

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ fatigue_grade + pain_nrs + dyspnea_grade + appetite_loss_grade', df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Symptom appetite_loss_grade coef=-0.0002, p=9.83e-01 (mutually adjusted).

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_regorafenib has a non-zero (likely small) main effect on pfs_months and the effect may differ by prior_lines_of_therapy.
Higher prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Regorafenib main coef=0.952, p=2.59e-140. prior_lines_of_therapy coef=0.005, p=5.99e-01. Interaction coef=0.016, p=4.77e-01.
Per +1 prior line: PFS coef=0.0078, p=3.88e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs between race_ethnicity=black patients and race_ethnicity=white patients.
Mean pfs_months differs between race_ethnicity=hispanic patients and race_ethnicity=white patients.
Mean pfs_months differs between race_ethnicity=asian patients and race_ethnicity=white patients.
Mean pfs_months differs between race_ethnicity=other patients and race_ethnicity=white patients.

analyses.result_summary: PFS in black vs white: coef=-0.0423 months, p=1.89e-01.
PFS in hispanic vs white: coef=-0.0010 months, p=9.72e-01.
PFS in asian vs white: coef=-0.0099 months, p=8.20e-01.
PFS in other vs white: coef=0.0914 months, p=2.20e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs between insurance_type=medicare patients and insurance_type=private patients.
Mean pfs_months differs between insurance_type=medicaid patients and insurance_type=private patients.
Mean pfs_months differs between insurance_type=uninsured patients and insurance_type=private patients.

analyses.result_summary: PFS in medicare vs private: coef=-0.0187, p=4.10e-01.
PFS in medicaid vs private: coef=-0.0533, p=9.45e-02.
PFS in uninsured vs private: coef=-0.0816, p=1.29e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs between rural_residence=1 and rural_residence=0 patients.
Higher education_years is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS rural vs urban: 4.331 vs 4.307, diff=0.024, p=3.39e-01.
Per +1 year of education: PFS coef=0.0033, p=3.37e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: At least one SNP among the snp_* columns is associated with pfs_months at a level surviving Bonferroni correction.

analyses.code: for each snp_*: smf.ols(f'pfs_months ~ {snp}', df).fit() and rank by p

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable OLS model, ecog_ps, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, cea_ng_ml, crp_mg_l, nlr, weight_loss_pct_6mo, liver_mets, prior_lines_of_therapy each retain independent associations with pfs_months in their expected directions, while biomarker-matched treatments (cetuximab in KRAS-wt, pembrolizumab in MSI-H, encorafenib in BRAF, trastuzumab/tucatinib in HER2-amp) explain treatment effects.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_cetuximab on pfs_months is modified by ecog_ps (interaction term differs from zero).
The effect of treatment_bevacizumab on pfs_months is modified by ecog_ps (interaction term differs from zero).
The effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months is modified by ecog_ps (interaction term differs from zero).
The effect of treatment_encorafenib on pfs_months is modified by ecog_ps (interaction term differs from zero).
The effect of treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib on pfs_months is modified by ecog_ps (interaction term differs from zero).
The effect of treatment_regorafenib on pfs_months is modified by ecog_ps (interaction term differs from zero).

analyses.result_summary: treatment_cetuximab main coef=-0.062 (p=5.56e-02); treatment_cetuximab x ecog_ps interaction coef=0.035, p=2.54e-01.
treatment_bevacizumab main coef=0.001 (p=9.64e-01); treatment_bevacizumab x ecog_ps interaction coef=-0.023, p=4.17e-01.
treatment_pembrolizumab main coef=-0.038 (p=3.58e-01); treatment_pembrolizumab x ecog_ps interaction coef=0.061, p=1.20e-01.
treatment_encorafenib main coef=0.029 (p=5.52e-01); treatment_encorafenib x ecog_ps interaction coef=-0.024, p=6.00e-01.
treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib main coef=-0.003 (p=9.52e-01); treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib x ecog_ps interaction coef=-0.050, p=3.33e-01.
treatment_regorafenib main coef=0.952 (p=1.82e-151); treatment_regorafenib x ecog_ps interaction coef=0.005, p=8.92e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within an all-RAS/BRAF wild-type subgroup (kras_mutation=0, nras_mutation=0, braf_v600e=0), cetuximab effect on pfs_months is positive and larger than in patients with any of these mutations (positive interaction with the wild-type indicator).
Within RAS/BRAF wild-type patients, cetuximab benefit is larger in left-sided (right_sided_primary=0) than right-sided primaries.

analyses.code: Construct ras_braf_wt = (kras_mutation==0) & (nras_mutation==0) & (braf_v600e==0); fit pfs_months ~ treatment_cetuximab * ras_braf_wt
analyses.result_summary: In RAS/BRAF wt (n=25324): cetuximab vs no = 4.44 vs 4.49, diff=-0.045, p=1.70e-01. In RAS/BRAF mut (n=24676): cetuximab vs no = 4.12 vs 4.15, diff=-0.034, p=2.51e-01. Interaction coef=-0.012, p=7.92e-01.

analyses.code: Within RAS/BRAF-wt subgroup, fit pfs_months ~ treatment_cetuximab * right_sided_primary
analyses.result_summary: Within RAS/BRAF-wt: cetuximab main coef=-0.067 (p=1.04e-01); interaction with right-sided coef=0.041, p=5.62e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients receiving any biomarker-targeted therapy (cetuximab, pembrolizumab, encorafenib, or trastuzumab/tucatinib), biomarker-matched patients have longer pfs_months than biomarker-mismatched patients.

After adjusting for prognostic features (ECOG, age, albumin, LDH, CEA, CRP, NLR, liver/bone mets, right-sided primary, KRAS/BRAF/MSI), treatment_bevacizumab=1 is associated with non-zero pfs_months (testing residual main effect).

analyses.code: Among patients receiving any of cetuximab/pembrolizumab/encorafenib/trastuzumab_tucatinib, compare PFS in biomarker-matched vs biomarker-mismatched subgroups.
analyses.result_summary: Among patients given one of these biomarker-driven therapies, biomarker-matched patients (n=8356) had mean PFS 4.421 vs mismatched (n=19721) 4.267, diff=0.153, p=5.90e-07.
Adjusted bevacizumab coef=0.0041, p=7.02e-01.
